description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a predominantly brick exterior. The structure features large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. A spacious patio area with a swimming pool and built-in seating is visible, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and entertainment. The house includes multiple balconies and staircases, enhancing accessibility between levels and outdoor spaces. The property is set on a rectangular lot with a paved area adjacent to the house, likely serving as a driveway or additional outdoor space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, multi-story brick house with large windows, flat roof, balconies, and a poolside patio. The design features clean lines and a mix of indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a prominent balcony, staircases, and a partial view of the pool and patio area.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the full length of the house, the pool, patio seating, and the large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the main entrance area, garage or covered space, and the pool in the foreground.
description_view_3: This view displays the other side of the house, showcasing multiple balconies, staircases, and the brick facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, steps, and a covered area, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on clean lines.
